account_id.description: The account uuid associated with this transaction line

account_no.description: The account number associated with this transaction line

amount.description: The amount (in cents) of the transaction

available_balance.description: The account "available balance" at the point in time this transaction was posted

balance.description: The account balance at the point in time this transaction was posted

created.description: The creation date of the transaction

currency.description: ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code of the transfer amount

is_fee.description: Whether or not this line is considered a fee

is_gl_acc.description: Whether or not this line represents a GL account

is_offset.description: Whether or not this line is considered the "offset" line

is_primary.description: Whether or not this line is considered the "primary" line

network.description: The network this transaction is associated with

tenant.description: The tenant associated with this transaction, in the form "<bankid>_<partnerid>"

updated.description: The date the transaction was last updated
